name: Linear
description: Linear is commonly used to support product workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Linear when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in product work.
founderWorkflow: Use Linear to keep product work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Linear before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
